ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was collected */,
  "julian_day" INTEGER /* Julian day of the year when the data was collected */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation amount (mm) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed (m/s) */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction (degrees from north) */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity (%) */,
  "air_temperature" REAL /* Air temperature (°C) */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation (W/m²) */,
  "cloud_transmission" REAL /* Cloud transmission (%) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating the quality of the data (e.g., good, questionable) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station (m) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the data category (e.g., precipitation, wind) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_categories" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the research group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)
